goals.description: Execute the 'shutdown ritual' on the analysis document: save, close all related tabs, and physically stand up to sever the cognitive tether before the sleep debt causes a total system crash.
goals.rationale: Achieving the 'done' state satisfies my primary value of competence; continuing to stare at the screen is diminishing returns that threaten my physical stamina. I must lock in this win to preserve my reputation as someone who delivers results.

goals.description: Initiate a silent, high-protein meal alone without checking messages or initiating conversation, strictly adhering to a no-social-interaction window for the next hour.
goals.rationale: My avoidant conflict style dictates that explaining my absence from the reading deadline requires vulnerability I cannot afford right now. Eating in isolation allows me to address biological needs without risking social harmony or exposing my weakness to the group.

goals.description: Draft a concise, factual email to the professor acknowledging the late submission of the analysis but omitting any mention of the missing reading until tomorrow morning when I have regained composure.
goals.rationale: This task is deferred because the emotional cost of confronting the professor now outweighs the immediate benefit. My deliberate planning horizon suggests waiting until I am rested will yield a better outcome for both my grades and my interpersonal standing.
